finding_title: SMTP delivery_id 不含正文/内容版本，且缺标准 Message-ID
scope: Harden SMTP delivery identity evidence for V7.1 inherited A-017 by explicitly separating mail_key, content_revision_id, delivery_id, and standard Message-ID while preserving fail-closed SMTP authorization.
non_scope: No real SMTP enablement, scheduler installation, Release upload, production restore, public schema, DB migration, source adapter, ranking, CURRENT, V7.1/V7.2 contract file, P0/P1 closure, integrated production acceptance, or daily operation enablement change.

smtp_identity_contract.mail_key: sha256(cycle_id, product_id, recipient) with explicit components recorded
smtp_identity_contract.content_revision_id: sha256(subject, plain body sha256, html body sha256)
smtp_identity_contract.message_id: standard RFC-style Message-ID under arxiv-daily-push.local derived from mail_key and content_revision_id
smtp_identity_contract.daily_runner_binding: local and scheduled daily routes pass date cycle_id and M1 product_id
smtp_identity_contract.resend_policy: same mail_key and content_revision retry keeps Message-ID; content revision change requires explicit supersede or resend

validation: py_compile PASS for smtp_delivery.py, scheduled_execution.py, local_runner.py, and test_smtp_delivery.py
remaining_blockers: Inherited V7.1 P0=8 and P1=37 remain open until independent review accepts remediation evidence.
S2PMT07 final gate precheck remains blocked.
This manifest does not enable real SMTP or claim INTEGRATED_PRODUCTION_ACCEPTED.
